posts.title: Thurston County, WA, becomes first in the nation to pass an ordinance FORCING people to obtain a certain "home energy score" before they're allowed to sell their house. The goal? Reduce carbon emissions...

The goal? Reduce carbon emissions...

These climate change cultists want to control your lives.

posts.title: The SAVE Act Doesn't 'Disenfranchise' American Citizens.  Illegals Cannot Be Disenfranchised Because They are Entitled to NOTHING...

link_metadata.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer is so strongly opposed to secure elections that he called the SAVE America Act bill “a naked attempt to rig our elections” and said Democrats were prepared to remain on the floor “all day, all night, as long as it takes.” The SAVE America Act would require citizens to show both proof of citizenship and identification when voting.
